content.text:
<analysis>
a. Summary: This is a PR review context for a GO annotation review of a 9POAL NCGR_LOCUS3088 gene (ITPase). The PR adds 4 new files for this gene review.

b. This is a request for code review feedback - the user wants me to review the pull request for code quality, bugs, performance, security, and test coverage.

c. Key information:
   - PR adds GO annotation review for Miscanthus lutarioriparius inosine triphosphate pyrophosphatase
   - 4 new files added: ai-review.yaml, goa.tsv, notes.md, uniprot.txt
   - All 10 IEA annotations reviewed with specific actions (4 ACCEPT, 6 KEEP_AS_NON_CORE)
   - Manual file creation was needed due to `just fetch-gene` failure
   - Validation with `just validate 9POAL NCGR_LOCUS3088` mentioned in test plan

d. Main tasks:
   - Read and analyze the 4 added files
   - Check adherence to project guidelines from CLAUDE.md
   - Validate YAML structure and content quality
   - Review annotation decisions and rationale
   - Check for any potential issues or improvements

e. Plan:
   - Read the project CLAUDE.md for guidelines
   - Examine each of the 4 added files
   - Validate the YAML structure against schema requirements
   - Review the annotation decisions for scientific accuracy
   - Check file formatting and consistency
   - Provide comprehensive feedback via GitHub comment

f. No special permissions or tools appear to be needed for this review task.
</analysis>

I'll review this pull request and provide comprehensive feedback. Let me start by creating a todo list and analyzing the changes.

input.body: ### PR Review: 9POAL NCGR_LOCUS3088 (ITPase) GO Annotation Review **Todo List:** - [ ] Read project guidelines from CLAUDE.md - [ ] Review NCGR_LOCUS3088-ai-review.yaml structure and content - [ ] Check NCGR_LOCUS3088-goa.tsv format and data - [ ] Review NCGR_LOCUS3088-notes.md documentation - [ ] Examine NCGR_LOCUS3088-uniprot.txt data - [ ] Validate YAML against schema requirements - [ ] Assess annotation decisions and scientific rationale - [ ] Check for code quality, security, and best practices - [ ] Provide comprehensive feedback and recommendations [View job run](https://github.com/ai4curation/ai-gene-review/actions/runs/24819351324)
